title: QMask Hemispheric Separation
steps: Open the Qmask tool and click “pick XML” and open the QuickN XML file generated in QuickNII.
Enter the appropriate coordinates from the QMask Coordinates file .
Click “Destination” and navigate to the QVN\Mask folder. Click “Go”. The mask output should be a black and White PNG that looks something like this:
Mask files shouldautomatically come with the appropriate naming convention with _mask at the end.Example: NG18I_s061_mask
creator: Michael Henderson
